goal: Instagram link as an icon + make it work in-app + remove the 'Get app' banner until the app ships
done: Footer Instagram link is now an inline SVG icon (currentColor, aria-label) instead of text. Added a native-only click handler: in the Capacitor WKWebView a target=_blank external link does nothing, so it opens via @capacitor/browser (system browser) — fixes the 'link not working' report if tested in-app; plain web anchor unchanged. Commented out the home 'Get app' banner on index.html + th/index.html (restore when the iOS app is live).
verified: chrome harness: footer shows IG icon · email · privacy (icon 20px, inherits color); homepage has 0 .home-app-banner and no 'Get app' text; EN+TH. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
